description: Create a content slide titled 'Some key numbers on the outlook for 2025' with five side-by-side donut charts showing percentages for Environment, Economy, Society, Technology, and Security.

header.headline: Some key numbers on the outlook for 2025

steps.label: The outlook for 2025: Environment
steps.sub: say "Average global temperatures will increase", up from 76% last year.

steps.label: The outlook for 2025: Economy
steps.sub: say "Prices in ... Australia will increase faster than people's incomes", up from 83% last year.

steps.label: The outlook for 2025: Society
steps.sub: say "The level of immigration into my country will increase", down from 74% last year.

steps.label: The outlook for 2025: Technology
steps.sub: say "Artificial Intelligence will lead to many new jobs being lost in my country", up from 61% last year.

steps.label: The outlook for 2025: Security
steps.sub: say "There will be a new global pandemic caused by a new virus", down from 42% last year.
